message:
🐛 Fix compliance card detection: OPA false positives, Kubescape timeout, invalid kubectl flag (#2802)

**OPA false positives** — when transitioning from demo to live mode,
demo statuses (with fake violations for ALL clusters) persisted in
state. Clusters without Gatekeeper (konflux-ci, ks-docs-oci) kept
showing demo violations. Fix: clear statuses on demo→live transition.

**Kubescape timeout** — 4155 scan summaries (6MB JSON) on vllm-d
took 2.6s locally but 13+ seconds through the agent WebSocket queue
(4 concurrent slots, 11 clusters). The 15s timeout was barely enough.
Increased to 30s.

**Invalid kubectl flag** — `--limit=50` is not a valid kubectl flag.
Changed to `--chunk-size=50` which controls server-side pagination
for API-aggregated resources.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
